_meta.description: Single source of truth mapping TourVisio hotel-level facility ids/names to filterable feature groups. Read by the hotel module (id/name -> group label) and available to the AI Intention module (user keyword -> group label). Keep this the ONLY facility grouping in the codebase.
_meta.warning: The facility id/name set below was derived from a single sample hotel (GetProductInfo, hotel id 14). The real TourVisio dataset almost certainly contains more facility ids (66+ and gaps). Consumers MUST treat any unmapped id/name as simply ungrouped -- never throw on an unknown facility.
_meta.pricesearchFacilityNote: Observed against the live test service: pricesearch CAN return per-hotel facilities[] in some environments (contradicts the original 'no facilities in pricesearch' assumption). If that holds generally, search-screen facility filtering may not need per-hotel GetProductInfo and the N+1 concern should be re-evaluated. Out of scope for the hotel-details card -- track as a separate card.
